name: Booster Co., Ltd.
summary: Booster Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and markets commercial and industrial boilers in South Korea. It offers tube boilers, vacuum hot water boilers, no pressure tube type boilers, water supply units, booster cleaners, cool shots, accessories, and control systems, as well as scrum systems for tube type boilers. The company was formerly known as Yeoryeon Boiler Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Booster Co., Ltd. in October 1988. Booster Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jincheon-eup, South Korea.
